text:
1. First, convert the time subtraction into a 24 - hour arithmetic: \(17:57-22:37=(17 + \frac{57}{60})-(22+\frac{37}{60})=17.95 - 22.6167=- 4.6667\).
2. Since it is a 24 - hour wrap - around, add 24 hours: \(-4.6667 + 24 = 19.3333\).
3. Convert 0.3333 hours to minutes: \(0.3333\times60 = 20\) minutes. So the time is \(19:20\).
FINAL_ANSWER: 19:20
